info.title: HaloSitek Core API
info.description: OpenAPI metadata for HaloSitek Backoffice API.

example.message: Log aktivitas AI chatbot berhasil diambil.

data.prompt_preview: Generate konsep fasad rumah modern tropis.

get.summary: Get AI chatbot activity log detail

example.message: Detail log aktivitas AI chatbot berhasil diambil.

data.original_request: Generate image masterplan urban mixed-use detail...

get.description: Returns overview metrics for registered users, approved architects, and active projects.
Returns user growth series based on selected range.
Returns approved architect growth series based on selected range.
Returns a list of architects for public browsing.
Returns the authenticated user's saved architect wishlist.

post.description: Saves a specific architect to the authenticated user's wishlist.

delete.description: Removes a specific architect from the authenticated user's wishlist.

post.description: Registers a new user and returns an access token and refresh token.
Authenticates user credentials and returns a token pair.
Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new token pair.
Revokes the current access token and optionally the refresh token provided in the request body.

get.description: Returns the profile data of the currently authenticated user.

post.description: Updates the profile of the currently authenticated user.

get.description: Returns a paginated award list with optional status filtering.

post.description: Creates a new award record by an architect, including verification file upload.

put.description: Updates award data; admin users can only update award status.

delete.description: Deletes an award record and its verification file by id.

put.description: Approves or declines an award by setting status to approved or declined. Admin only endpoint.

data.reason: Arsitek tidak hadir pada jadwal konsultasi.

get.summary: Get payout queue grouped by architect
Get release payment detail for architect

get.description: Mengambil daftar percakapan milik user yang sedang login.

post.description: Membuat percakapan baru (default private chat). Jika private chat sudah ada, data existing dapat dikembalikan.

get.description: Mengambil detail percakapan berdasarkan ID conversation.
Returns FAQ items; public users can only see active entries.

data.question: How do I become an architect on this platform?
data.answer: Register and complete your architect profile.

post.description: Creates a new FAQ entry through admin access.

data.question: How do I become an architect on this platform?
data.answer: Register and complete your architect profile.

get.description: Returns details for a single FAQ by id.

data.question: How do I become an architect on this platform?
data.answer: Register and complete your architect profile.

put.description: Updates an existing FAQ entry by id.

data.question: How do I become an architect on this platform?
data.answer: Your architect profile has been updated.

delete.description: Deletes an FAQ entry by id.

get.description: Mengambil daftar pesan pada conversation tertentu.

post.description: Mengirim pesan teks ke conversation dan men-trigger broadcast real-time.
Menandai seluruh pesan lawan bicara pada conversation sebagai sudah dibaca dan update last_read_at user.
Mengirim status typing indicator ke private channel conversation.

get.description: Returns a paginated project list with optional status filtering.

data.name: Modern House
data.description: Two-story tropical house with natural lighting.
data.highlight_features: Void area, skylight, and rooftop garden.

post.description: Creates a new project by an architect with image and layout uploads.

highlight_features.example: Void area, skylight, and rooftop garden.

project.name: Modern House

project.name: Modern House
project.description: Two-story tropical house with natural lighting.
project.highlight_features: Void area, skylight, and rooftop garden.

put.description: Updates project data; admin users can only update project status.

delete.description: Deletes a project and related stored image files by id.

put.description: Approves or declines a project by setting status to approved or declined. Admin only endpoint.

post.description: Adds a like to the specified project for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Removes a like from the specified project for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns a paginated user list for administrative usage (admin only).

post.description: Creates a new user account from the administrative panel.

get.description: Returns details for a specific user by id.

put.description: Updates a target user's account status (for example: active or suspend).

delete.description: Deletes a user account by id.

bio.example: Experienced architect specializing in tropical modern homes.

answer.example: Daftar akun lalu lengkapi profil arsitek.

UnauthorizedError.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid access token.

message.example: Unauthorized. Access token is missing or invalid.

ForbiddenError.description: Forbidden - user does not have permission for this action.

message.example: Forbidden. You are not allowed to perform this action.

NotFoundError.description: Not Found - requested resource was not found.

ConflictError.description: Conflict - resource already exists or state conflict occurred.

ValidationError.description: Validation Error - request input is invalid.

password: The password must be at least 8 characters.

ServerError.description: Internal Server Error - an unexpected server error occurred.

BearerAuth.description: Use Sanctum access token in Authorization header as: Bearer {token}
